final_prompt.prompt:
Create an editorial photo of a French romantic bedroom scene with a four-poster bed and sheer canopy.

Style/medium: editorial interior photography, romantic French provincial style, soft editorial aesthetic
Composition: wide-angle establishing shot from corner of room, 35mm lens, natural depth showing bed as focal point
Subject: four-poster bed with flowing sheer canopy, vintage vanity table with ornate mirror, scattered rose petals on white linens
Scene/backdrop: Parisian street view visible through tall French windows with wrought iron balconies, morning haze outside
Lighting/mood: soft diffused morning sunlight filtering through sheer curtains, warm golden hour glow, lazy and elegant atmosphere
Color palette: warm cream and ivory as base, soft blush pink from rose petals, muted sage green accents, warm wood tones
Materials/textures: flowing linen canopy fabric, polished antique wood vanity, crisp cotton bedding, delicate silk rose petals
Avoid: harsh shadows, cluttered composition, modern furniture, neon colors, plastic textures, over-processed HDR look
